nodes.label: Skills / Prompt Library Screen Wireframe
nodes.description: Desktop skills/prompt library browsing screen. Header area features the mascot cat holding a pointer. Horizontal category filter tabs: Creativity, Marketing, Coding, Education, Productivity. Below are skill cards in a grid layout, each with a title (e.g., Prompt for Storytelling, Customer Support Prompt, Data Analysis Script, Graphic Design Prompts, Resume Writing), a cat illustration, and a difficulty badge (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced).
